problem: Gastroenterology departments need streamlined documentation for endoscopic procedures that integrates with hospital systems, ensures clinical accuracy, and reduces the administrative burden on physicians during procedures.
solution: Provation offers procedure documentation and clinical decision support software for GI endoscopy. Their platform provides structured reporting for colonoscopy, EGD, and other GI procedures, with built-in clinical guidance, quality measure tracking, and integration with EHR systems. It helps improve documentation completeness and clinical outcomes.
